titleStmt.title: Taʾammǝrātihu la-Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon
ተአምራቲሁ፡ ለመባአ፡ ጽዮን፡
Taʾammǝrātihu la-Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon
Miracles of Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon
Miracles of the Saviour of the World worked by Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

abstract.p: General record for the Miracles of the saint Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon.

The Miracles are listed following The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon and Mss Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420, Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817, Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 1779, and Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024. The text as currently shown follows the edition The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon and Mss Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420 and Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

div.label: Introduction
div.ab: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ እንከ፡ ድርሳነ፡ ተዝካረ፡ መድኃኒነ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ለለወርኁ፡ በገጸ፡ ኵሉ፡ መካን፡ በቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፨ ዘከሠተ፡ ሎቱ፡ ለመባዓ፡ ጽዮን፡ ለምክንያተ፡ ድኂን፡ ዘተውህቦሙ፡ ለአማንያን፡ ወዕብነ፡ ዕቅፍት፡ ለከሐድያን፡ ዘያከብሮ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ በዓል፡ በኃይለ፡ መስቀሉ፡ ይዕቀቦ፡ ለይኩን፡
div.note: After Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024.

div.label: How the saint healed a child with a swollen throat
div.ab: ወመጽአት፡ አሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ ጸዊራ፡ ሕፃነ፡ ሕሙመ፡ ዘሐብጠ፡ ጕርኤሁ፡ ዘኢይክል፡ ጥቢወ፡ ጥባ፡ ለእሙ። ወትቤሎ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ነጽር፡ አባ፡ እስመ፡ ይመውት፡ ወልድየ፡ ወፈውሶ፡ ሊተ፡ ተማኅፀንኩ፡ በአምላክከ። ወይቤላ፡ ለእመ፡ ተፈወሰ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ሕፃን፡ ትሁቢዮኑ፡ ብጽዓተ፡ ከመ፡ ይግበር፡ ለተዝካረ፡ መድኅን። ወትቤሎ፡ እወ፡ ይኩን፡ በከመ፡ ትቤ።
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon16-17, cp. Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024, no. 2-1 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: How the saint healed a sick child brought to the saint by his mother
div.ab: ወካዕበ፡ መጽአት፡ አሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ ጽዊራ፡ ሕፃነ፡ ሕሙመ፡ ዘአልጸቀ፡ ለመዊት። ወገደፈቶ፡ ታሕተ፡ እገሪሁ። ወትቤሎ፡ ንሣእ፡ ዘነተ፡ ሕፃነ፡ ለእመ፡ ፈወስኮ፡ በጸሎትከ፡ ቅድስት፡ ይኩንከ፡ ገብረ። ወይቤላ፡ ሊተሰ፡ ኢይኩነኒ፡ አላ፡ ይኩን፡ ገብሮ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ።
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon17-18, cp. Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024, no. 2-2 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: Light that appeared over the dough from which the bread for the commemoration of the Saviour of the World was made
div.ab: ወሀሎ፡ በአስፈሬዳ፡ ምሉእ፡ ሐሪፅ፡ ዘይትገበር፡ ለኅብስተ፡ ተዝካሩ፡ ለወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፤ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፤ ኮነ፡ በላዕሌሁ፡ ለሐሪጽ፡ ጽቃውዕኒ፡ ይነድድ፡ እሳት፡ ዘያንጸበርቅ፡ ፈድፋደ።
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon18, cp. Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024, cp. no. 4c in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 1779.

div.label: The barren woman who could bear children by the prayer of the saint
div.ab: ወመጽአ፡ አሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ ወትቤሎ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ተዘክረኒ፡ በጸሎትከ፡ ቅድስት፤ እስመ፡ በጻሕኩ፡ ኀበ፡ ብዙሐን፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ወኢፈጸምኩ፡ ጻሕቅየ።
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon18, cp. no. 2-4 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: Pieces of bread for the commemoration of the Saviour of the World turned into an icon of the Virgin Mary
div.ab: ወሀለወት፡ አሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ እምነ፡ አሐቲሁ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ወሰአለቶ፡ ከመ፡ የሀባ፡ እምኅብስተ፡ ተዝካሩ፡ ለመድኃኒነ። ወወሀባ፡ ፪ፍርፋራተ፡ ወነሢአ፡ ዘንተ፡ እንዘ፡ ተሐውር፡ ረከባ፡ ፩መነኮስ፡ ወሰአላ፡ ከመ፡ ተሀቦ፡ ውእተ፡ ፍርፋራተ፡
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon19, cp. Gulo Maḵadā, Dabra Māʿṣo Qǝddus Yoḥannǝs, MY-024, no. 2-2-5 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: The man who ate the bread for the commemoration of the Saviour of the World after he ate another bread
div.ab: ወአሐተ፡ ዕለተ፡ እንዘ፡ ይሁቦሙ፡ በእደዊሁ፡ እምውእቱ፡ ኅብስት፡ በከመ፡ ይሁቦሙ፡ ዘልፈ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ቍርባን፡ አቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ተመጠወ፡ ፩ብእሲ፡ እምድኅረ፡ በልዩ፡ ካልአ፡ ኀብስተ። ወኢያእመሮ፡ መኑሂ፡ ዘከመ፡ ገብረ፡ ዘንተ፡
div.note: After The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon19-20, no. 2-3 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420, no. 2-2-6 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: Devotion of ʾabuna Takla Māryām to the celebration of the commemoration of the Saviour
div.ab: ስምዑ፡ አበውየ፡ ወአኀውየ፡ እለ፡ ታፈቅረዎ፡ ለክርስቶስ፡ ዕበያ፡ ተአምሪሁ፡ ወብፁዕ፡ አቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ያፈቅሮ፡ ለመድኀኒነ፡ ወኢይዴምር፡ ምስለ፡ ካልአን፡ በዓላት፡ መባዓ ወዕጣነ፡ ቅብዓ፡
div.note: After no. 2-4 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420, probably The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSSLady Meux ManuscriptE. A. WallisBudgeLondonW. Griggs1898Lady Meux Manuscript11https://archive.org/details/cu31924026887855/page/n4EthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyonEthiopicHagiographybm:Budge1898MabaaSeyon20.

div.label: Reward for those who observe the commemoration of the Saviour of the World
div.ab: ስምዑ፡ ዘይቤ፡ መድኅን፡ ዘገብረ፡ ተዝካርየ፡ በኅብስት፡ ወበስዋዐ፡ አው፡ ዘይሁብ፡ ማኅቶተ፡ ለቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ እማዕምቀ፡ ልቡ፡ስሒቆ፡ ተዘኪሮ፡ ስቅለትየ፡ አማን፡ አብለክመ፡
div.note: After no. 2-5 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: How the saint brought many souls from Hell by the order of the Child Jesus
div.ab: ወካዕበ፡ በአሐቲ፡ ዕለት፡ እንዘ፡ ይጸሊ፡ ቀዊሞ፡ በጽሒቅ፡ አቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ርእየ፡ ሕፃነ፡ እምርሑቅ፡ እንዘ፡ ይትዋነይ፡ አምሳለ፡ ሕፃናት፡ እኂዞ፡ በትረ፡ ወርቅ፡
div.note: After no. 2-6 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: How the Child Jesus appeared to the saint who was going to Warwar to celebrate the feast of Masqal Kǝbrā
div.ab: ወእምዝ፡ ሖረ፡ አቡነ፡ ተክለ፡ ማርያም፡ ሀገረ፡ ዳሞት፡ ኀበ፡ ተዝካረ፡ መስቀል፡ ክብራ፡ ብፅዕት፡ በቃሉ፡ ይቤ፡ ለሊሁ፡ እንዘ፡ አሐውር፡ በፍኖት፡ ርኢኩ፡ ሰብአ፡ ብዙኀነ፡ ብምሥያጥ፡ ዘወርወር፡
div.note: After no. 2-7 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: The promise of the Lord to convert Gāfāt and give them to Mabāʾa Ṣǝyon
div.note: After no. 2-8 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: Vision of Takla Māryām about the lives of the saints in Heaven
div.note: After no. 2-9 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 3420.

div.label: The man who threw down the bread of the memorial feast because of bad temper
div.note: No. 2-2-7 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: How Takla Ḥawāryāt went into seclusion until the Lord revealed to him the memorial day of his death
div.note: No. 2-2-8 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: The monastic community in Qolozǝyā (Warab) which decided to observe the memorial day of the Saviour
div.note: No. 2-2-9 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: How the servant, who was serving at the memorial feast of the Saviour, became sick because he had slept with his wife the previous night
div.note: No. 2-2-10 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

div.label: The story of the woman from Dārāt whose rooster was carried off by a kite
div.note: No. 2-2-11 in Collegeville, Hill Museum and Manuscript Library, MS EMML no. 4817.

bibl.title: The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSS
Lady Meux Manuscript
The lives of Mabâ’ Ṣĕyôn and Gabra Krĕstôs. The Ethiopic texts edited with an English translation and a chapter on the illustrations of Ethiopic MSS
Lady Meux Manuscript
